subject: Did you miss this?
body:
We're 7 days away.

A lot of people miss this...

Every book in the $100M series has been a meta book.

This means the book demonstrates tactics that actually work.

With $100M Offers - is a book about making offers so good people feel stupid saying no…I put it on Kindle for .99 cents and made an Instagram post. But…it also came with *a full course*, for free, no optin required. So it grew on word of mouth alone. The offer for the book itself showed you how to make offers.

$100M Leads - is all about advertising: ads, content, outreach, affiliates, employees, agencies, referrals. The works. And we used all of them to get over a more than a mid-sized city registered for a live event. The advertising for the book itself showed you how to advertise.

$100M Money Models is all about making the right offers, in the right order, at the right time… so you can monetize more customers, at higher prices, faster, over and over again. Because if you can't monetize, nothing else matters. The Money Model for the book itself will show you how to create your own Money Models.

This is the most powerful book I've ever written - if we define power as the aggregate change in business owners lives.

Things are about to get interesting

Expect fireworks.

Alex

P.S - To make sure you don't miss the event, & get my free secret giveaway - it's better than an NFT and less than a Bitcoin…and every single person who shows up live gets it - all you have to do is…

Register
Show up live on August 16th at 9am PT /12pm ET

See you in 7 days.
